concerns.text: Plan Phase 0 Research Tasks (R01-R04) have no corresponding T### tasks in tasks.md. PT000-PT005 are Plan-Root Tasks but do not cover the research tasks (R01: Verify scipy RAM, R02: Design synthetic data generator, R03: Define annotation protocol, R04: Confirm power analysis calculation). Missing implementation tasks for plan elements.

T081 ID conflict: tasks.md defines T081 as 'Verify SC-026: Monte-Carlo validation passes' but plan.md Task Registry defines T081 as 'Constitution Compliance Audit (Principles I-VII)'. Same ID refers to different work, breaking plan-to-task traceability.

T044 ID conflict: tasks.md defines T044 as 'Power Analysis utility (FR-025)' but plan.md Task Registry defines T044 as 'Power Analysis Calculation (N≥300)'. Same ID refers to different work, breaking plan-to-task traceability.

T096 stale tag: plan.md states 'T096 removed to eliminate duplication' but T096 still appears in tasks.md with active implementation requirements ('Verify that data/checksums.txt matches output/manifest.json'). Task should be removed or plan updated.

FR-026 contains corrupted text: 'A large number of replicates will be used. The research question is: Can a generative model learn to accurately simulate the dynamics of complex systems?...' appears mid-requirement. T062 references FR-026 but the spec text is broken, affecting task coverage validity.
